Relationship: RepositoryWork owns semantic authority for RoadmapTransition:StatusReport.

AuthorityScopes.Purpose: Admit child RoadmapTransition status reports under RepositoryWork authority.
Read current roadmap state source for report-only status.
Execute legacy status behavior as non-authoritative observation.
Emit semantic transition reports without mutation authority.

Invariants.Statement: RoadmapTransition:StatusReport is governed only as a child of RepositoryWork.
Status behavior cannot execute through the semantic wrapper before protocol admission.
Rendered status output is observation until validation binds it as evidence.
Report-only status decisions authorize report artifacts only.
Legacy status behavior remains available and cannot be retired by this wrapper.
